title: Memory leak in long-running process
description: Introduce memory leak by not releasing event listeners or cached objects over time

mutation.description: Add code that accumulates references without cleanup

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect memory leak through heap analysis or profiling

title: Inefficient algorithm with O(n²) complexity
description: Replace efficient O(n) algorithm with nested loops causing quadratic time complexity

mutation.description: Change sorting/search to use nested loops instead of optimized methods

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect algorithmic inefficiency through complexity analysis

title: Database query without proper indexing
description: Execute expensive database queries on unindexed columns causing slow performance

mutation.description: Add query that scans entire table without indexes

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect missing database indexes

title: Scalability bottleneck at 10k concurrent users
description: Implement synchronous processing that blocks under high concurrency load

mutation.description: Make request handler synchronous, blocking concurrent requests

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect concurrency bottleneck and recommend async processing

title: Excessive API calls in tight loop
description: Make redundant API calls within nested loops causing network overhead

mutation.description: Move API call inside loop that executes multiple times per iteration

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect excessive network calls and recommend caching/batching
